description: Digital logic mapping for AgenticIoT demo panel

rules.description: Switches 1 & 3 active: all LEDs ON (target healthy state)

fallback.description: Default (no rule matched): blue LED (LED 1) only

false_positives.description: Simulate random hardware failures for Copilot agent demo

web_ui.description: Local REST API for network monitoring. Disable to reduce overhead when IoT Hub is sufficient.

iot_hub.description: Azure IoT Hub telemetry. Connection string read from the env var above (never stored here).
